//: Sample response of GET /store/summary — a marketplace health headline for an at-a-glance strip: how many plugins are installed, a per-state tally (ordered by count descending, ties by state name), and how many have at least one unmet dependency (the Store's 'needs attention' count). Computed from the same data as /store/plugins. Mirrors the summary convention shared with activity (byCategory), brain (byModel) and dashboard (byKind).
